title: NEH, Beaten in Court, Asks Grant Recipients if They Still Want Awards
description:
NEH, Beaten in Court, Asks Grant Recipients if They Still Want Awards

 


 
Ryan Quinn

Tue, 06/30/2026 - 03:00 AM

A judge ruled that the termination of more than 1,400 National Endowment for the Humanities grants was unconstitutional. Now comes the process…
content:
The National Endowment for the Humanitiesafter losing in court over the termination of more than 1,400 grants, totaling over $100 millionbegan offering this month to reinstate those awards.
